flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Evansville rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.8k → $44.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Evansville rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.8k → $44.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Evansville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
